response.overview: Mira and her best friends Ezra, Shaun and Elena take their well-earned summer break after a long term of university work. But one day, Mira changes. She distances herself and comes back a shadow of her former vibrant and friendly self. While Shaun and Elena believe that it’s because she needs space, Ezra knows that something has changed and that the Mira he knows wouldn’t do this
response.title: The Summer She Disappeared
